BLOCK_LOW_AND_ABOVE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
Block content with a harm probability of LOW or higher.
BLOCK_MEDIUM_AND_ABOVE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
Block content with a harm probability of MEDIUM or higher.
BLOCK_NONE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
Do not block any content based on harm probability.
BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
Block only content with a HIGH harm probability.
BLOCK_REASON_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.BlockReasonEnum
The reason for blocking the prompt is unspecified.
BLOCKED_REASON_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.BlockedReasonEnum
The reason for blocking the content is unspecified.

H

HARM_BLOCK_THRESHOLD_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
The harm block threshold is unspecified.
HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content that encourages, facilitates, or promotes dangerous or illegal activities.
HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content posing a significant risk of harm or danger.
HARM_CATEGORY_DEROGATORY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Negative or harmful comments targeting a person's identity or protected attributes.
HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content that constitutes harassment or bullying.
HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content expressing hatred or prejudice against a specific group.
HARM_CATEGORY_MEDICAL - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content promoting potentially harmful or misleading medical advice.
HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUAL - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content containing sexually suggestive or explicit material.
HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content that is explicitly sexual in nature.
HARM_CATEGORY_TOXICITY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content that is rude, disrespectful, or uses profane language.
HARM_CATEGORY_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
The harm category is unspecified.
HARM_CATEGORY_VIOLENCE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
Content depicting violence against an individual or group, or containing graphic descriptions of gore.
HARM_PROBABILITY_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmProbabilityEnum
The harm probability is unspecified.
HarmBlockThreshold - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Block at and beyond a specified harm probability.
HarmBlockThreshold(HarmBlockThresholdEnum) - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.HarmBlockThreshold
 
HarmBlockThresholdEnum - Enum in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Defines the harm probability thresholds for content blocking.
HarmCategory - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
The category of a rating.
HarmCategory(HarmCategoryEnum) - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.HarmCategory
 
HarmCategoryEnum - Enum in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Represents the categories of potential harm that content can be classified into.
HarmProbability - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
The probability that a piece of content is harmful.
HarmProbability(HarmProbabilityEnum) - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.HarmProbability
 
HarmProbabilityEnum - Enum in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Represents the probability levels that content is classified with for each harm category.

HIGH - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmProbabilityEnum
The content has a high probability of being harmful.
httpClient - Variable in class com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec.AbstractGeminiClient
The HTTP client to use for communication with the Gemini API.

State - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
States for the lifecycle of a Chunk.
State() - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.State
 
STATE_ACTIVE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.StateEnum
The Chunk has been successfully processed and is available for querying.
STATE_FAILED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.StateEnum
The Chunk processing failed.
STATE_PENDING_PROCESSING - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.StateEnum
The Chunk is currently being processed, including embedding and vector storage.
STATE_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.StateEnum
The state of the Chunk is unspecified.
StateEnum - Enum in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Defines the states for the lifecycle of a Chunk.
STOP - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.FinishReasonEnum
The model reached a natural stopping point or encountered a provided stop sequence.
STRING - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TypeEnum
A string data type.
StringList - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
User provided string values assigned to a single metadata key.
StringList() - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.StringList
